plot outline: Phil Lord and Christopher Miller, the creative minds behind The Lego Movie and 21 Jump Street, bring their unique talents to a fresh vision of a different Spider-Man Universe, with a groundbreaking visual style that's the first of its kind. "Spider-Man(TM): Into the Spider-Verse" introduces Brooklyn teen Miles Morales (Shameik Moore), and the limitless possibilities of the Spider-Verse, where more than one can wear the mask.
title: Spider-Man: Into the Spider-Verse
akas: Spider-Man: Dans le Spider-Verse (Canada, French title)

distributors.name: Walt Disney Studios Sony Pictures Releasing (WDSSPR)
